title: Metallocenes for the manufacture of polypropylene
abstract: The disclosure relates to a metallocene complex of formula (I) wherein Mt is Zr or Hf; L is O or S; X is a sigma ligand; R 1 are each independently, same or different from each other, C 1 -C 20 -hydrocarbyl, optionally containing up to two heteroatoms of Group 14-16 of the Periodic Table, or form together with the Si atom they are attached to a C 4 -C 8 -ring; R 2 is heteroaryl, C 6 -C 10 -aryl, or linear or branched C 1 -C 10 -hydrocarbyl, whereby said C 6 - C 10 -aryl and heteroaryl are optionally substituted with 1 to 3 R 21' ; with R 21' being C 1 -C 10 - hydrocarbyl; R 2' is heteroaryl or C 6 -C 10 -aryl, R 2' being optionally substituted with 1 to 3 R 21' ; with R 21' being C 1 -C 10 -hydrocarbyl; n are each independently, same or different from each other, an integer from 1 to 5; R 3 and R 4 are each independently, H or C 1 -C 20 -hydrocarbyl or 芒聙聯OR 31 , wherein R 31 is C 1 - C 10 -hydrocarbyl, whereby at least one R 3 and at least one R 4 is not hydrogen; R 51 and R 51' are each independently, same or different from each other, C 1 -C 10 - hydrocarbyl; and R 6 and R 6' are each independently, same or different from each other, C(R 61 ) 3 , with R61 being linear or branched C 1 -C 6 -alkyl.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS 1. A metallocene complex of formula (I) wherein Mt is Zr or Hf; L is O or S; X is a sigma ligand; R 1 are each independently, same or different from each other, C 1 -C 20 -hydrocarbyl, optionally containing up to two heteroatoms of Group 14-16 of the Periodic Table, or form together with the Si atom they are attached to a C 4 -C 8 -ring; R 2 is heteroaryl, C 6 -C 10 -aryl, or linear or branched C 1 -C 10 -hydrocarbyl, whereby said C 6 - C 10 -aryl and heteroaryl are optionally substituted with 1 to 3 R 21芒聙聶 ; with R 21芒聙聶 being C 1 -C 10 - hydrocarbyl; R 2 芒聙聶 is heteroaryl or C 6 -C 10 -aryl, R 2芒聙聶 being optionally substituted with 1 to 3 R 21 芒聙聶; with R 21 芒聙聶 being C 1 -C 10 -hydrocarbyl; n are each independently, same or different from each other, an integer from 1 to 5; R 3 and R 4 are each independently, H or C1-C20-hydrocarbyl or 芒聙聯OR 31 , wherein R 31 is C1- C10-hydrocarbyl, whereby at least one R 3 and at least one R 4 is not hydrogen; R 51 and R 51 芒聙聶 are each independently, same or different from each other, C1-C10- hydrocarbyl; and 

R 6 and R 6 芒聙聶 are each independently, same or different from each other, C(R 61 ) 3 , with R61 being linear or branched C 1 -C 6 -alkyl. 2. A metallocene complex of formula (I) as claimed in claim 1 having formula (I-a) (I-a) wherein Mt is Zr or Hf; X is a sigma ligand; R 1 are each independently, same or different from each other, C 1 -C 20 -hydrocarbyl, optionally containing up to two heteroatoms of Group 14-16 of the Periodic Table, or form together with the Si atom they are attached to a C 4 -C 8 -ring; R 2 is heteroaryl, C 6 -C 10 -aryl or linear or branched C 1 -C 10 -hydrocarbyl, whereby said C 6 - C 10 -aryl and heteroaryl are optionally substituted with 1 to 3 R 21芒聙聶 ; with R 21芒聙聶 being C 1 -C 10 - hydrocarbyl; R 2 芒聙聶 is heteroaryl or C 6 -C 10 -aryl, R 2芒聙聶 being optionally substituted with one to three R 21 芒聙聶; with R 21 芒聙聶 being C 1 -C 10 -hydrocarbyl; n are each independently, an integer from 1 to 5; R 3 and R 4 are each independently, H, C1-C20-hydrocarbyl or 芒聙聯OR 31 , wherein R 31 is C1-C10- hydrocarbyl, whereby at least one R 3 and at least one R 4 is not hydrogen; R 51 and R 51 芒聙聶 are each independently, same of different from each other, C1-C10- hydrocarbyl; and R 6 and R 6 芒聙聶 are each independently, same or different from each other, C(R 61 ) 61 3, with R being linear or branched C 1 -C 6 -alkyl. 

3. A metallocene complex of formula (I) as claimed in claim 1 or 2 having formula (I-b) (I-b) wherein Mt is Zr or Hf; X is a sigma ligand; R 1 are each independently, same or different from each other, C 1 -C 20 -hydrocarbyl, optionally containing up to two heteroatoms of Group 14-16 of the Periodic Table, or form together with the Si atom they are attached to a C 4 -C 8 -ring; R 2 is linear or branched C 1 -C 10 -hydrocarbyl; R 2 芒聙聶 is heteroaryl or C 6 -C 10 -aryl, R 2芒聙聶 being optionally substituted with 1 to 3 R 21 芒聙聶; with R 21 芒聙聶 being C 1 -C 10 -hydrocarbyl; R 3 and R 4 are each independently, H, C 1 -C 20 -hydrocarbyl, or 芒聙聯OR 31 , wherein R 31 is C 1 -C 10 - hydrocarbyl, whereby at least one R 3 and at least one R 4 is not H; R 51 and R 51 芒聙聶 are each independently, same or different from each other, C 1 -C 10 - hydrocarbyl; and R 6 and R 6 芒聙聶 are each independently, same or different from each other, C(R 61 ) 3 , with R61 being linear or branched C1-C6-alkyl. 4. A metallocene complex of formula (I) as claimed in any one of claims 1 to 3 having formula (I-c) wherein Mt is Zr or Hf; X is a sigma ligand; R 1 are each independently, same or different from each other, C 1 -C 20 -hydrocarbyl, optionally containing up to two heteroatoms of Group 14-16 of the Periodic Table, or form together with the Si atom they are attached to a C 4 -C 8 -ring; R 2 is linear or branched C 1 -C 10 -hydrocarbyl; R 2 芒聙聶 is heteroaryl or C 6 -C 10 -aryl, R 2芒聙聶 being optionally substituted with 1 to 3 R 21 芒聙聶; with R 21 芒聙聶 being C 1 -C 10 -hydrocarbyl; R 3 and R 4 are each independently C 1 -C 20 -hydrocarbyl; R 51 and R 51 芒聙聶 are each independently, same or different from each other, C 1 -C 10 - hydrocarbyl; and R 6 and R 6 芒聙聶 are each independently, same or different from each other, C(R 61 ) 3 , with R61 being linear or branched C1-C6-alkyl. 5. A metallocene complex of formula (I) as claimed in any one of claims 1 to 4 having formula (I-d) (I-d) wherein Mt is Zr or Hf; X is a sigma ligand; R 1 are each independently, same or different from each other, C1-C20-hydrocarbyl, optionally containing up to two heteroatoms of Group 14-16 of the Periodic Table, or form together with the Si atom they are attached to a C4-C8-ring; R 2 is linear or branched C1-C10-hydrocarbyl; R 2 芒聙聶 is heteroaryl or C6-C10-aryl , R 2芒聙聶 being optionally substituted with one to three R 21 芒聙聶; with R 21 芒聙聶 being C1-C10-hydrocarbyl; R 3 and R 4 are each independently C1-C10-hydrocarbyl. 6. A metallocene complex as claimed in any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein one or two R 3 are not H and the R 3 are the same, and two R 4 on the phenyl group are not H and these two R 4 are the same. 7. A polymerization catalyst, comprising, preferably consisting of (i) a metallocene complex of formula (I) as claimed in any one of claim 1 to 6; (ii) a cocatalyst comprising a group 13 element; and (iii) optionally a support. 8. The polymerization catalyst according to claim 7, wherein cocatalyst (ii) is an alumoxane cocatalyst, preferably in the absence of any further cocatalysts. 9. The polymerization catalyst as claimed in claim 7 or 8, supported on silica. 

10. A process for the polymerization of propylene, comprising polymerizing propylene and optionally at least one of comonomer selected from ethylene or C 4 -C 10 -alpha olefin comonomers in the presence of the polymerization catalyst claimed in any one of claim 7 to 9. 11. A process for the preparation of a heterophasic polypropylene copolymer comprising (I) polymerizing propylene in bulk in the presence of a polymerization catalyst as claimed in any one of claims 7 to 9 to form a polypropylene homopolymer matrix; (II) in the presence of said matrix and said polymerization catalyst and in the gas phase, polymerizing propylene and ethylene to form a heterophasic polypropylene copolymer comprising a homopolymer matrix and an ethylene propylene rubber. 12. A process for the preparation of a heterophasic polypropylene copolymer comprising (I) polymerizing propylene in bulk in the presence of polymerization catalyst as claimed in any one of claims 7 to 9 to form a polypropylene homopolymer; (II) in the presence of said homopolymer and said polymerization catalyst and in the gas phase, polymerizing propylene to form a polypropylene homopolymer matrix; (III) in the presence of said matrix and said polymerization catalyst and in the gas phase, polymerizing propylene and ethylene to form a heterophasic polypropylene copolymer comprising a homopolymer matrix and an ethylene propylene rubber (EPR). 13. A ligand of formula (II) wherein the dotted lines represent a double bond present in between carbons 1 and 2 or 2 and 3 of the indenyl ring; 

R 2 芒聙聶 is C 6 -C 10 -aryl or heteroaryl, R 2芒聙聶 being optionally substituted with one to three R 21 芒聙聶; with R 21 芒聙聶 being C 1 -C 10 -hydrocarbyl; R 4 are each independently, H or C 1 -C 10 -hydrocarbyl, whereby at least one R 4 is not H; R 51 芒聙聶 is linear or branched C 1 -C 10 -hydrocarbyl; and R 6 芒聙聶 is C(R 61 ) 3 , with R 61 being linear or branched C 1 -C 6 -alkyl. 14. A ligand as claimed in claim 13, wherein R 2 芒聙聶 is phenyl or thienyl, R 2芒聙聶 being substituted with 1 or 2 R 21 芒聙聶, with R 21 芒聙聶 being methyl.
